command.name: gcloud
command.description: manage Google Cloud resources and developer workflow

subcommands.name: ai-platform
subcommands.description: manage AI Platform jobs and models

subcommands.name: alpha
subcommands.description: alpha Alpha versions of gcloud commands

subcommands.name: auth
subcommands.description: manage oauth2 credentials for the Google Cloud SDK

subcommands.name: beta
subcommands.description: beta Beta versions of gcloud commands

subcommands.name: builds
subcommands.description: create and manage builds for Google Cloud Build

subcommands.name: components
subcommands.description: list, install, update, or remove Google Cloud SDK components

subcommands.name: composer
subcommands.description: create and manage Cloud Composer Environments

subcommands.name: compute
subcommands.description: create and manipulate Compute Engine resources

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: view and edit Cloud SDK properties

subcommands.name: container
subcommands.description: deploy and manage clusters of machines for running containers

subcommands.name: dataproc
subcommands.description: create and manage Google Cloud Dataproc clusters and jobs

subcommands.name: debug
subcommands.description: commands for interacting with the Cloud Debugger

subcommands.name: dns
subcommands.description: manage your Cloud DNS managed-zones and record-sets

subcommands.name: docker
subcommands.description: deprecated Enable Docker CLI access to Google Container Registry

subcommands.name: domains
subcommands.description: manage domains for your Google Cloud projects

subcommands.name: endpoints
subcommands.description: create, enable and manage API services

subcommands.name: feedback
subcommands.description: provide feedback to the Google Cloud SDK team

subcommands.name: filestore
subcommands.description: create and manipulate Cloud Filestore resources

subcommands.name: iam
subcommands.description: manage IAM service accounts and keys

subcommands.name: identity
subcommands.description: manage Cloud Identity Groups and Memberships resources

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: display information about the current gcloud environment

subcommands.name: kms
subcommands.description: manage cryptographic keys in the cloud

subcommands.name: ml
subcommands.description: use Google Cloud machine learning capabilities

subcommands.name: ml-engine
subcommands.description: manage AI Platform jobs and models

subcommands.name: organizations
subcommands.description: create and manage Google Cloud Platform Organizations

subcommands.name: projects
subcommands.description: create and manage project access policies

subcommands.name: pubsub
subcommands.description: manage Cloud Pub/Sub topics, subscriptions, and snapshots

subcommands.name: recommender
subcommands.description: manage Cloud recommendations and recommendation rules

subcommands.name: scheduler
subcommands.description: manage Cloud Scheduler jobs and schedules

subcommands.name: services
subcommands.description: list, enable and disable APIs and services

subcommands.name: sql
subcommands.description: create and manage Google Cloud SQL databases

subcommands.name: survey
subcommands.description: invoke a customer satisfaction survey for Cloud SDK

subcommands.name: tasks
subcommands.description: manage Cloud Tasks queues and tasks

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: print version information for Cloud SDK components
